articles.headline: Self-Employed Struggle With Paystubs
articles.problem: The business owner is struggling to provide paystubs as a self-employed individual, which is required for apartment rental applications. They have tried showing bank statements and invoices, but these are not accepted. This is causing frustration and difficulty in securing housing.
articles.solution: An AI-powered tool or service could generate legitimate-looking paystubs for self-employed individuals, or provide a platform for them to create and manage their own paystub records. This could help self-employed individuals to easily provide the necessary documentation for rental applications.
articles.monetisation: A paystub generation service could operate on a subscription-based model, offering self-employed individuals a convenient and affordable solution to this common problem.
articles.trend_signal: The gig economy and self-employment are on the rise, making this a growing problem that will affect an increasing number of people.
